title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Shadowfax - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Shadowfax - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Shadowfax invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Digital Marketing Manager at our Nashik location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Shadowfax:
Shadowfax is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shadowfax!
